message:
feat(router, macros): trie optimization and route macro improvements

- Cargo.toml: Update dependencies
- macros/route.rs: Improve route macro code generation
- router/trie.rs: Optimize trie node matching

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 [workspace]
 resolver = "2"
 members = [
-    # "crates/fastapi",  # Temporarily disabled - depends on fastapi-output
+    # "crates/fastapi",  # Disabled - fastapi-router Route struct has missing fields
     "crates/fastapi-core",
     "crates/fastapi-http",
     "crates/fastapi-router",
